prompt: Edit image 1: Apply the vibrant, sketchy multi-color line art and watercolor-like texture style of image 2 to the architecture, transforming the heritage structure into an expressive artwork.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Apply the distinctive artistic style of image 2, which is characterized by vibrant, multi-colored (e.g., red, blue, purple, black) sketchy line art and a watercolor wash texture on a textured paper background. Transform the large, curved red-orange astronomical structure and its immediate architectural surroundings in image 1 into an expressive, painterly artwork, adopting this aesthetic.
